questions.question:
Match the following port numbers with their uses:

\( \begin{array}{|ll|ll|} \hline & \textbf{List – I} & & \textbf{List – II} \\ \hline \text{a.} & 23 & i. & \text{World wide web} \\ \hline \text{b.} & 25 & ii. & \text{Remote login} \\ \hline \text{c.} & 80 & iii. & \text{USENET news} \\ \hline \text{d.} & 119 & iv. & \text{E-mail}  \\ \hline\end{array} \)



Computer Networks: UGC NET CSE | Junet 2015 | Part 2 | Question: 27
